basics.name: Clarence Lin
basics.label: Programmer
basics.summary: Backend Developer at BRONCI TECHNOLOGY INC. Engaged in website back-end development, DevOps, Linux operating system, cloud system architecture design and cloud system security. Run a personal blog, willing to share technical knowledge, and write articles about the problems encountered in the usual development process to share solutions with readers. Author of AWS CDK 完全學習手冊：打造雲端基礎架構程式碼 IaC（iT邦幫忙鐵人賽系列書）。
